basics.description:
## ![Conosco](TODO-REPLACE-WITH-PUBLICLY-HOSTED-LOGO-URL) Conosco Managed Sentinel

Deploys a fully configured Microsoft Sentinel workspace to a client tenant. All resources are provisioned in **UK South**.

**What this deploys:**
- Log Analytics Workspace (90-day retention, pay-as-you-go)
- Microsoft Sentinel
- UEBA (User and Entity Behaviour Analytics)
- Selected data connectors
- Playbook permissions for Logic App automation

> **Note:** Analytics rules and automation rules are deployed separately via DevOps after connector tables are populated.

basics.name: clientName
basics.label: Client identifier
basics.toolTip: Short lowercase identifier for the client. Used to name all resources: cns-<identifier>-sentinel. Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only.

validations.message: 2-20 characters. Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only. Cannot start or end with a hyphen.

options.text: All resources are deployed to UK South. The resource group location does not need to match.

All connectors are selected by default. Deselect any connector for which this client does not have the required licence. Attempting to enable an unlicensed connector will not break the deployment — it will be skipped with a warning in the deployment log — but it is cleaner to deselect upfront.

elements.name: connAzureActivity
elements.label: Azure Activity
elements.toolTip: No additional licence required. Included with any Azure subscription.

elements.name: connMDTI
elements.label: Microsoft Defender Threat Intelligence
elements.toolTip: Free tier available with any Sentinel workspace. No separate licence needed.

elements.name: connO365
elements.label: Microsoft 365
elements.toolTip: Requires Microsoft 365 Business Basic/Standard/Premium, E3, or E5.

elements.name: connIRM
elements.label: Microsoft 365 Insider Risk Management
elements.toolTip: Requires Microsoft 365 E5 Compliance, Microsoft 365 E5, or the Insider Risk Management add-on.

elements.name: connMCAS
elements.label: Microsoft Defender for Cloud Apps
elements.toolTip: Requires Microsoft 365 E5 or a standalone Defender for Cloud Apps licence.

elements.name: connMDE
elements.label: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
elements.toolTip: Requires MDE Plan 1 or Plan 2. Included in Microsoft 365 E5/A5/G5.

elements.name: connMDI
elements.label: Microsoft Defender for Identity
elements.toolTip: Requires a standalone Defender for Identity licence or Microsoft 365 E5.

elements.name: connMDO
elements.label: Microsoft Defender for Office 365
elements.toolTip: Requires MDO Plan 1 or Plan 2. Included in Microsoft 365 E5.

elements.name: connXDR
elements.label: Microsoft Defender XDR
elements.toolTip: Requires at least one Microsoft 365 Defender product licence (MDE, MDO, MDI, or MCAS).

elements.name: connEntraID
elements.label: Microsoft Entra ID
elements.toolTip: Basic sign-in and audit logs available with Azure AD Free. Non-interactive, service account, risky user data requires AAD P1 or P2.

elements.name: connEntraIDProt
elements.label: Microsoft Entra ID Protection
elements.toolTip: Requires Azure AD P2 (Microsoft Entra ID P2). Not available with Free or P1 licences.

outputs.enabledConnectors: [concat(if(steps('connectors').core.connAzureActivity, 'AzureActivity,', ''), if(steps('connectors').core.connMDTI, 'MicrosoftThreatIntelligence,', ''), if(steps('connectors').m365def.connO365, 'Office365,', ''), if(steps('connectors').m365def.connIRM, 'OfficeIRM,', ''), if(steps('connectors').m365def.connMCAS, 'MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity,', ''), if(steps('connectors').m365def.connMDE, 'MicrosoftDefenderAdvancedThreatProtection,', ''), if(steps('connectors').m365def.connMDI, 'AzureAdvancedThreatProtection,', ''), if(steps('connectors').m365def.connMDO, 'OfficeATP,', ''), if(steps('connectors').m365def.connXDR, 'MicrosoftThreatProtection,', ''), if(steps('connectors').entra.connEntraID, 'AzureActiveDirectory,', ''), if(steps('connectors').entra.connEntraIDProt, 'AzureActiveDirectoryIdentityProtection,', ''))]
